data.title: Implement figma-auth.sh: validate Figma PAT via GET /v1/me
data.description:
## testing_mode: GREEN

## What
Create plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh that reads the Figma PAT from config or environment, validates it via GET /v1/me, and exits 0 on success or 1 with re-provisioning instructions on failure.

## Background
RED integration tests FP-AUTH-1..3 already exist in tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh. This task implements the script to make those tests pass and removes the .test-index RED markers added by the URL parse task.

## Implementation Notes
- Read PAT from: (1) design.figma_pat in ${DSO_CONFIG_FILE:-.claude/dso-config.conf} as primary, (2) FIGMA_PAT env var as fallback
- If no PAT found from either source: exit 1 with clear configuration instructions on stderr
- API base: ${FIGMA_API_BASE_URL:-https://api.figma.com} (env var overrides base URL for testing)
- Validate PAT: curl -s -o /tmp/figma-me-response.json -w '%{http_code}' -H 'X-Figma-Token: <PAT>' ${FIGMA_API_BASE_URL}/v1/me
- On HTTP 200: exit 0
- On HTTP 401/403 or non-2xx: exit 1 with stderr message including re-provisioning instructions and 90-day expiry notice
- Parse config file for design.figma_pat key using grep/sed (no jq)
- Use python3 for JSON response parsing if needed (project convention: no jq)
- Make script executable: chmod +x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh

## .test-index RED marker cleanup
After implementing figma-auth.sh, remove the RED marker line that was added by the URL parse task:
  sed -i '' '/test_fp_auth_1_valid_pat/d' .test-index  # macOS
  OR: grep -v 'test_fp_auth_1_valid_pat' .test-index > .test-index.tmp && mv .test-index.tmp .test-index  # portable

Then git add .test-index before committing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh
- [ ] Valid PAT + mock server: exits 0
  Verify: FIGMA_PAT=figd_testtoken FIGMA_API_BASE_URL=http://nonexistent-test-only bash plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh; true  (actual test run by FP-AUTH-1 integration test)
- [ ] Integration tests FP-AUTH-1..3 pass (requires mock server as in integration test)
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] All 7 integration tests (FP-URL-1..4, FP-AUTH-1..3) pass
  Verify: bash tests/integration/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh; [ $? -eq 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index RED marker for auth tests removed
  Verify: grep -v 'test_fp_auth_1_valid_pat' .test-index | wc -l  # entry should be gone
- [ ] FIGMA_API_BASE_URL env var overrides API base URL
  Verify: grep -q 'FIGMA_API_BASE_URL' plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh
- [ ] PAT env-var fallback: FIGMA_PAT env var used when design.figma_pat absent from config
  Verify: grep -q 'FIGMA_PAT' plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh
- [ ] Re-provisioning instructions on 401: error message references 90-day expiry
  Verify: grep -q '90.day\|90 day' plugins/dso/scripts/figma-auth.sh

## Escalation Policy
Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference.
